title: SolarWinds security advisory (AV26-549)
description: Between June 2 and 3, 2026, SolarWinds published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: SolarWinds Serv-U  versions prior to 15.5.4 HF1
SolarWinds Web Help Desk  versions prior to 2026.2
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
